meta.title: VAT-compliant invoicing software for international freelancers | InvoiceMonk
meta.description: Create invoices that hold up in Germany, France, Netherlands, Kenya, Philippines and 30+ countries. Reverse charge, sequential numbering, and mandatory fields built in.

hero.description: Every invoice you create in InvoiceMonk is automatically structured with the mandatory fields, VAT treatment, and compliance language required in your client's country. Not bolted on after. Built in from the start.
hero.trustText: Used by freelancers billing clients in 30+ countries. Pro from $15/month,

problem.label: The problem
problem.title: Why your current invoicing tool keeps letting you down
problem.leadShort: You send the invoice. Their accountant sends it back.
problem.body1: Maybe the German client's team flagged a missing Leistungsdatum. Maybe the Dutch client's bookkeeper asked why there is no KVK number. Maybe the French client's accountant rejected it because the TVA exemption phrase was missing. Maybe the Kenyan client deducted 20% withholding tax and nobody told you that was coming.
problem.body2: Generic invoicing tools were not built for this. They let you add a currency and a logo. They do not know what the law requires in Berlin, Amsterdam, Paris, or Nairobi.

features.label: What InvoiceMonk builds into every invoice

items.title: Country-specific mandatory fields, automatic
items.body: Select your client's country and InvoiceMonk applies the correct mandatory fields for that jurisdiction. German invoices get the Leistungsdatum field. Dutch invoices get BTW-ID and KVK number. French invoices get SIRET, TVA status, and the late payment clause. Kenyan invoices get the KRA PIN field. You never need to research what goes on an invoice again.

items.title: Reverse charge notation, generated correctly
items.body: When you invoice a VAT-registered business client in another country, InvoiceMonk detects the cross-border transaction and generates the correct reverse charge notation automatically, including the Article 196 EU VAT Directive wording your client's accountant will look for. No manual research. No wrong wording. No rejected invoices.

items.title: Sequential numbering, enforced by the system
items.body: EU tax authorities treat gaps in invoice numbers as a red flag. InvoiceMonk assigns every invoice the next number in an unbroken sequence, automatically. You cannot skip, delete, or reuse a number. Gaps are structurally impossible. Your audit trail is clean by default.

items.title: Multi-currency invoicing, fully compliant
items.body: Invoice in EUR, GBP, USD, CHF, CAD, AUD, KES, PHP, or any currency your client pays in. The compliance fields and VAT treatment apply correctly regardless of which currency the invoice is denominated in.

items.title: VAT and tax exemption handling, built in
items.body: Operating under Germany's Kleinunternehmerregelung? France's franchise en base de TVA? The Netherlands' KOR scheme? InvoiceMonk generates the correct exemption phrase on your invoice automatically. Your invoice is compliant whether you charge VAT or not.

items.title: Credit notes, issued correctly every time
items.body: Made an error on a sent invoice? InvoiceMonk generates a credit note that references the original by number and date, reverses the VAT correctly, and keeps your sequence intact. No gaps. No deleted documents. No audit risk.

tabbed.title: Built for the clients you actually invoice
tabbed.subtitle: Every market has its own invoice rules. InvoiceMonk applies the right ones automatically.

eu.label: EU clients
eu.title: Everything EU clients require, built in
eu.description: EU VAT invoicing has 13 mandatory fields under the VAT Directive 2006/112/EC. Miss one and the invoice is legally non-compliant, meaning your client cannot claim input VAT and their accountant will reject it. InvoiceMonk includes every mandatory field for every EU member state, plus country-specific additions for Germany, France, Netherlands, Poland, and Bulgaria.

africa.label: African clients
africa.title: Invoice Kenyan, Ghanaian, and South African clients correctly
africa.description: Each African market has its own invoice requirements. Kenya requires a KRA PIN and reverse charge language under the VAT Act Cap 476. Ghana requires GRA VAT fields. South Africa requires SARS-compliant invoice structure. InvoiceMonk includes the correct mandatory fields for each market, so your invoice arrives ready to process, not ready to reject.

global.label: Global clients
global.title: Any country, any currency, always compliant
global.description: For clients outside InvoiceMonk's specific country templates, the platform applies the international B2B invoice baseline: both party details, sequential invoice number, date of supply, specific service description, net amount, VAT treatment with reverse charge notation where applicable, and your payment details. A professional, compliant invoice for any client anywhere.

auditReady.label: Audit-ready from the moment you create the invoice
auditReady.title: Stop worrying about audits before
auditReady.description: Every invoice you create in InvoiceMonk is automatically structured with immutable records that cannot be altered after sending. Gaps in your invoice sequence are impossible. Incorrect VAT treatment is flagged before the invoice goes out. Every document is traceable, timestamped, and stored.
features: Immutable invoice records that cannot be altered after creation
Complete audit trail with timestamps for every invoice
Sequential numbering with no gaps, ever
Tax-ready reports for any filing period
Digital signature and cryptographic stamps (QES) for every invoice

howItWorks.label: From client to compliant invoice in three steps

steps.title: Add your client
steps.body: Enter your client's name, country, and billing address. InvoiceMonk saves these details so every future invoice for that client starts pre-configured for their country's requirements.

steps.title: Build your invoice
steps.body: Add your line items, rate, and currency. InvoiceMonk applies the correct mandatory fields, VAT treatment, and compliance language for your client's country, automatically.

steps.title: Send and track
steps.body: Send the invoice directly from InvoiceMonk. Track when it is opened, when payment is due, and receive automatic reminders. Your records update in real time.

comparison.title: Compliance is the difference

faq.title: Invoicing questions, answered
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about InvoiceMonk invoicing.

items.question: How much does Invoicemonk cost?
items.answer: Invoicemonk's Pro plan starts at $15/month and includes VAT-compliant invoicing with automatic reverse charge notation, sequential numbering enforcement, and country-specific mandatory fields, for every invoice, to every country. SME is $49/month and Biz is custom. No free plan or trial — cancel anytime.

items.question: How do I get started with InvoiceMonk?
items.answer: Create a free account, add your business details and tax identification number, add your first client and their country, and create your first invoice. The compliance fields for your client's country appear automatically. The whole setup takes under five minutes.

items.question: Can I customise my invoices with my logo?
items.answer: Yes. You can add your business logo, choose your invoice colour, and customise the layout. All mandatory compliance fields remain in place regardless of design choices, compliance and branding are not in conflict.

items.question: Can I save invoice templates for different currencies?
items.answer: Yes. InvoiceMonk saves your client profiles including their country, currency preference, and VAT number. Every new invoice for that client starts pre-configured. For different currencies, simply select the currency at the invoice level.

items.question: Does InvoiceMonk support withholding tax?
items.answer: Yes. For markets where withholding tax applies, such as Kenya's 20% non-resident WHT, InvoiceMonk includes the correct notation on the invoice so your client's accountant knows how to process the deduction. You invoice the full agreed amount and the client handles the withholding.

items.question: Does InvoiceMonk integrate with accounting software?
items.answer: InvoiceMonk is focused on invoicing and compliance. Export your invoice data, reports, and records at any time in standard formats compatible with your accounting software.
